problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: Combining Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
